framework.name: CAAM - Contextual Agent Authorization Mesh
framework.description: Authorization profile by independent authors (Barney, Pioli, Watson) that composites SPIFFE, IPSIE, GNAP, RATS, and OpenID XAA into a sidecar-based authorization mesh for agent-to-agent flows. Introduces Session Context Object (SCO) with 'ctx' JWT claim for purpose-bound delegation and multi-hop intent binding.
framework.raw_quote: CAAM extends the GNAP model by introducing the Session Context Object (SCO) as a purpose-bound grant envelope that constrains the agent's evolving resource requests to the boundaries of the original human intent.
